hints.description: This consumer goods company manufactures and markets a wide range of household, personal care, and specialty products. Their portfolio includes brands like Arm & Hammer baking soda, Trojan condoms, and Batist dry shampoo. Founded in 1846, the company has a long history of innovation and adapting to changing consumer needs, maintaining a strong presence in both traditional and emerging markets.
hints.funFact1: Initially, the company, founded by Mark ***** and Dr. Frank *****, focused primarily on the production of baking soda and fertilizers, with the baking soda initially being sold as a cure-all remedy.
hints.funFact2: ***** & ***** Co. acquired Vilella beauty products in 2016, which included the popular Batist dry shampoo brand, significantly expanding their presence in the personal care sector.
